advisory: June 2026 (tollbooth-dpyc v0.44.2-v0.44.5). SECURITY: v0.44.2 fixes a credential-card redemption leak - receive_credentials / receive_patron_credentials could echo raw credential values when redeeming an ncred card. Operators MUST run tollbooth-dpyc >=0.44.2 (network minimum). v0.44.3 moves Secure Courier relay I/O off the async event loop (serverless responsiveness under load). v0.44.4-v0.44.6 add coverage measurement in CI and decompose the standard-tool registration into tested tools/ modules (coupons, pricing, identities, status, proof, courier) behind thin shims - no wire-API changes. All operator MCPs are pinned ==0.44.6.
architecture_notes: Schema symmetry: every operator and the Authority each get their own Neon schema. The public schema is no longer used. Credential storage uses encrypted_blob column within operator schemas. Standard tool bodies are progressively moving out of register_standard_tools into tested tollbooth.tools.* modules (coupons, pricing/check_price, identities, status, proof) behind thin proof-gate shims; tool names and behavior are unchanged.
